Items.Title: Colombia qualify for last 32 with win over DR Congo
Items.Description: Daniel Munoz's deflected strike is enough for Colombia to beat DR Congo and secure their place in the 2026 World Cup knockout stage.

Items.Title: Who is DR Congo's 'living statue' Michel Nkuka?
Items.Description: DR Congo will face Colombia this evening at 3am British time, and it's Michel Nkuka's time to shine.

Items.Title: Who are the ITV pundits, presenters and commentators for Colombia vs DR Congo?

Items.Title: Selección Colombia
Items.Description:
¡𝐒𝐮𝐦𝐚𝐦𝐨𝐬 𝟑 𝐩𝐮𝐧𝐭𝐨𝐬 𝐝𝐞𝐝𝐢𝐜𝐚𝐝𝐨𝐬 𝐚 𝐧𝐮𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐨 𝐩𝐚𝐢́𝐬! 🤩

𝐕𝐢𝐜𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐢𝐚 𝐝𝐞𝐥 𝐞𝐪𝐮𝐢𝐩𝐨 𝐝𝐞 𝐓𝐎𝐃𝐎𝐒 𝐞𝐧 𝐆𝐮𝐚𝐝𝐚𝐥𝐚𝐣𝐚𝐫𝐚 🥹🔥
